homePage.label: // home

aboutPage.label: // about
aboutPage.title: Studio-first craft for modern Minecraft products.
aboutPage.copy: ZCraft Studios builds server systems, plugins, and web experiences for teams, communities, and creators. We combine design, performance, and polished delivery for commercial-grade releases.

commissions.title: Web Design
commissions.desc: Landing pages, resource hubs, and studio sites.

resourcesPage.label: // resources
resourcesPage.title: Tools, configs, and kits built for real servers.
resourcesPage.copy: A studio-grade toolkit for server operators and plugin teams. Every download is designed to ship fast and scale cleanly.

donate.title: Support ZCraft Studios
donate.copy: Help us keep building premium Minecraft resources, plugins, and modern web experiences.

request.label: // commission
request.title: Request a Custom Service
request.copy: Tell us what you need. We'll respond within 24 hours with a quote and timeline.

fields.hint: So we can reach you back

team.name: Zain Abusal
team.bio: Passionate Minecraft developer with 2+ years of experience building websites and server systems. Focused on performance and user experience.

projects.title: Evidence Discord Bot
projects.summary: Efficient and secure Discord bot for managing evidence in community moderation, built with Node.js.

projects.title: Visual Config Studio
projects.summary: No-code Minecraft plugin configuration suite with smart auto-detection, live validation, and production-ready export tools.

projects.title: LuckPerms Visual Tree
projects.summary: Interactive no-code permission studio for LuckPerms with hierarchy visualization, drag-and-drop inheritance, conflict debugging, and simulation tools.

projects.title: Z-Auth
projects.summary: Proxy-first authentication for Minecraft networks. Authenticates players at the proxy, syncs login state securely across backend servers, and blocks movement, commands, inventory, and combat until login completes.

resources.title: Evidence Discord Bot
resources.summary: Best discord bot for performance and handling user cases and moderation.

resources.title: Visual Config Studio
resources.summary: Advanced visual configuration editor for Minecraft plugins with schema detection, validation, and export tooling.

resources.title: LuckPerms Visual Tree
resources.summary: Premium LuckPerms visual permission editor with interactive hierarchy management and debugging tools.

resources.title: Z-Auth
resources.summary: Proxy-first authentication for Minecraft networks. Authenticates players at the proxy, syncs login state securely across backend servers, and blocks movement, commands, inventory, and combat until login completes.

reviews.name: Almotasem
reviews.text: Amazing work, Was available most of the day and finished work quickly.

contact.title: let's build something premium.
contact.copy: Open for plugin commissions, server setups, and modern web work. Discord is the fastest way to reach me — replies usually within a few hours.
